description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a predominantly gray exterior. The keyboard is white with black key markings, and the touchpad is located on the left side of the palm rest, which is an unusual placement. The screen is large, black, and bordered by a thin bezel, with a small, centered emblem below the display. The lid features several colorful, pixel-art style stickers, including a red 'MOD' badge, a green square with a white symbol, an orange 'bLiTTle' text, and a black-and-white shield-like icon. The laptop has visible ports along the sides and red accent details on the palm rest and above the keyboard, giving it a distinctive, customized appearance.
description: A slim, gray laptop with a white keyboard, left-aligned touchpad, and colorful pixel-art stickers on the lid. Red accent details and multiple side ports add to its customized look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open black screen, white keyboard, left-aligned touchpad, and red accent bars on the palm rest and above the keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile, visible side ports, and the edge of the keyboard and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gray lid adorned with four colorful pixel-art stickers and the laptop's hinge design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile, additional side ports, and the right edge of the keyboard and screen.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and standard key arrangement.
attribute_sticker_placement: Four pixel-art style stickers are placed on the back lid: a red 'MOD' badge in the upper left, a green square with a white symbol in the upper center, an orange 'bLiTTle' text in the center, and a black-and-white shield-like icon in the upper right.
